description_long: This is an old, worn book with a beige cover and visible signs of aging, such as frayed and discolored edges. The front cover features a simple black border and a small emblem or logo in the center, with printed text above it. The spine is black and appears to be made of a different, possibly more durable material than the rest of the cover. The interior pages are yellowed and contain a grid of blue and red stamps or printed marks, suggesting it may be a stamp or ration book. The book is partially open, revealing the inner pages and the extent of wear along the edges. The overall appearance is utilitarian and historical, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A worn beige book with a black spine, simple cover design, and interior pages filled with blue and red stamps. The book shows significant aging and frayed edges.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the beige color, black border, emblem, and printed text, with the black spine on the left.
description_view_1: The book is partially open, revealing the inner pages with a grid of blue and red stamps, and the black spine is visible from the side.
description_view_2: The book is fully open, displaying two pages filled with blue and red stamps, and the worn edges of the pages are prominent.
description_view_3: The back cover and part of the interior are visible, with the black spine on the right and the grid of stamps partially seen.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid black with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears to be made of a different, more durable material than the cover.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small emblem or logo is present on the front cover, located below the title text. It appears as a geometric or symbolic design.
